title: Two Sum
statement: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return the indices of the two numbers that add up to target.

steps.description: Recognize the brute-force is O(n^2) nested loop and articulate why that's the baseline.
Identify the bottleneck: rescanning for the complement each iteration.

hints.text: Inner scan for target-x is wasted.

steps.description: Hashing gives O(1) lookup of complement.

hints.text: A dict from value to index.
Use a dict mapping value -> index.
